name: nt-broker
description: DI Operacinė Sistema NT Brokeriui – profesionalūs NT promptai, skelbimai ir klientų komunikacija

scripts.test: npm run test:docs && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:ui: cd nt-broker-ui && npm run copy-sot && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.test:e2e: start-server-and-test "cd nt-broker-ui && npm run build && npx vite preview --port 4173 --host 0.0.0.0" "http://127.0.0.1:4173/nturtas/" "cross-env BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173/nturtas/ npx playwright test tests/e2e/nt-broker-ui.spec.js"
scripts.test:mixed: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
